hypothesis: Incorporating a structured semantic-episodic memory module that persistently stores parsed paper table schemas, force-field parsing heuristics, and past agent corrections into the multi-agent framework will reduce the Research Team's incorrect parameter assignments by at least 60% and decrease the Experiment Setup Team's task-specific logical/setup errors (e.g., incorrect mixture selection, inappropriate cutoff choices, missing file copies) by at least 70% across a benchmark of heterogeneous publications and simulation tasks.
